title: Part-time Retail Assistant – CheeseDotCom
description:
Location: Crescendo Building, 25 Upper East Coast Road,Singapore

Working Schedule:
3 days per week (Fixed schedule for Friday & Saturday)
Friday: 11am - 7pm
Saturday: 10am - 8pm
1 weekday to be discussed (schedule 11am - 7pm)

Monthly: S$1,300

We are looking for a friendly, enthusiastic and reliable Part-Time Retail Assistant to join our team.

As a Retail Assistant, you will be responsible for assisting customers, ensuring the store is well-stocked and organized and helping create a pleasant experience for customers.

Opportunity to be converted to a full-time role.

Staff discount and opportunities to participate in wine & cheese tasting events.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Delightful in welcoming / interaction with customers
  • Handle, weigh and package artisanal products with precision and care
  • Create and post engaging social media content, must be proficient in creating and editing social media advertisements
  • Ensure shelves are always stock and keep the shop organized and clean
  • Handle customer transactions, cashering duties, organize deliveries / online orders
  • Ensure appropriate food handling and hygiene standards are maintained
  • Assist with special promotions or events when needed

Requirements:

  • Junior / Mid-level / Social Media Specialist with strong advertising skills
  • Working students and fresh graduates are encouraged to apply
  • Friendly and approachable with good communication skills
  • Eager to learn and able to work independently and as part of a team
  • Able to work at least one weekend every week
  • Able to start immediately

Interested applicants, please send your CV to cdcadmin@cheesedotcom.sg or message us directly in WhatsApp +65 82261400 to arrange for interview.

postedCompany.description:
Join Our Team at CheeseDotCom Singapore!

At CheeseDotCom, we share a passion for exceptional cheese, fine wines and genuine hospitality. Our shop offers a curated selection of European classics, local creations and handpicked wines. 


We’re driven by quality, sustainability and craftsmanship and our team is dedicated to guiding customers through a unique tasting experience.

If you’re excited to be part of a welcoming and vibrant environment, we’d love to hear from you!
postedCompany.name: CHEESEDOTCOM LLP

districts.location: D15 Katong, Joo Chiat, Amber Road
